creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 212809
poudriere build log for science/hdf5

The port science/hdf5 fails in the packaging phase for me using poudriere on my 12.1-stable amd64 system. 

Below is an excerpt from the build log which I have attached with the relevant errors:
